---
title: "manual_learn.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/harness/manual_learn.py"
loc: 44
complexity: 8
logic_score: 3.00
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.88
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating run_learning_cycle. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 17 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [colorama](file://colorama)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)
- [tests.harness.raven_proxy](file://tests.harness.raven_proxy)
- [traceback](file://traceback)

### Exports
- `run_learning_cycle`
